purpose: R-W3-RATCHET-1: the exact failing/erroring tests of the focused 17-module command at slice-0 landing, measured in the PINNED context: the clean patched worktree (branch tip + the slice final patch), with failure fingerprints. tests/contracts/test_correction_ratchet.py (slice 1) enforces: current failures must be a subset of this ledger AT (test id, fingerprint) granularity; the ledger only SHRINKS (a fixed test is removed in the slice that fixes it); a new fingerprint inside an already-red test is a NEW failure and reddens. setUpClass masks carry an explicit unmask rule.
